case_title: GLENRIDGE LIMITED, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP vs. DAWSON, RENEE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLENRIDGE LIMITED, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT DAWSON, RENEE DAWSON, TINA AKA SABRINA DAWSON DAWSON, TROY AKA TROY SANDRIDGE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
